name: SABnzbd
compose:
name: slashnode-sabnzbd
services:
  web:
    image: linuxserver/sabnzbd:5.0.4
    container_name: web
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      DOCKER_MODS: linuxserver/mods:universal-package-install
      INSTALL_PACKAGES: ffmpeg
      PUID: '1000'
      PGID: '1000'
      TZ: Etc/UTC
    volumes:
      - web_data-config:/config
      - web_shared-data-storage-downloads:/downloads
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:9876:8080
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data-config:
    name: slashnode-sabnzbd_web_data-config
  web_shared-data-storage-downloads:
    name: slashnode-sabnzbd_web_shared-data-storage-downloads
notes: Auto-converted from getumbrel/umbrel-apps (sabnzbd). Review before shipping. Upstream: https://sabnzbd.org/.
